pad1.name: `get_effect_name 1`
pad1.color: effect_active 1 on ? var_equal 'FX1MomPush' 0 ? color 'green' : color 'blue' : color 'blue'

pad2.name: `get_effect_name 2`
pad2.color: effect_active 2 on ? var_equal 'FX2MomPush' 0 ? color 'green' : color 'violet' : color 'violet'

pad3.name: `get_effect_name 3`
pad3.color: effect_active 3 on ? var_equal 'FX3MomPush' 0 ? color 'green' : color 'magenta' : color 'magenta'

pad4.name: BrakeStart
pad4.color: effect_active 'brakestart' on ? blink 250ms ? color 'red' : color 'black' : color 'red'

pad5.name: ^ MP
pad5.color: effect_active 1 on ? var_equal 'FX1MomPush' 1 ? color 'green' : color 'blue' : color 'blue'

pad6.name: ^ MP
pad6.color: effect_active 2 on ? var_equal 'FX2MomPush' 1 ? color 'green' : color 'violet' : color 'violet'

pad7.name: ^ MP
pad7.color: effect_active 3 on ? var_equal 'FX3MomPush' 1 ? color 'green' : color 'magenta' : color 'magenta'

pad8.name: Backspin
pad8.color: effect_active 'backspin' on ? blink 250ms ? color 'red' : color 'black' : color 'red'
